# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-stage Deployment Pipeline
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: 14
      - name: Install and build dependencies
        run: |
          npm install
          npm run build
      - name: Cache Node modules
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

  download_and_deploy:
    name: Download and Deploy Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          repository: your-repo-name/your-repo-name
          ref: ${{ needs.build.outputs.commit-sha }}
      - name: Use cache for Node modules from build job
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ needs.build.outputs.node-cache-key }}
      - name: Restore artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        id: artifacts_download
        with:
          name: build
      - name: Run deployment scripts
        run: |
          npm install
          npm run deploy --using-downloaded-artifacts
